# Scenario: follow-up-turn-tty
# Preconditions: session ses_01HXYZABCDEF01 is active from first-prompt-new-session.tty.txt.
# Rule (Phase 1 truth table): plain text + active session -> append new turn (turn 2), do NOT create a new session.
# Turn ID:    turn_01HXYZABCDEFT2
# Attempt:    attempt_01HXYZABCDEFA2  (fresh attempt_id; same session)
# Sandbox:    bakudo-ses_01HXYZABCDEF01-t2-a1
# Clock:      2026-05-01T12:02:30Z .. 2026-05-01T12:02:41Z
#
# Narration must NOT say "Starting new session". It MUST say "Continuing session ...".

\e[36m\e[1mBakudo\e[0m  \e[1mstandard\e[0m  \e[2msession ses_01HXYZ…F01\e[0m  \e[2mrepo bakudo-abox\e[0m

\e[2m> now make the summary more concise\e[0m

\e[1mYou:\e[0m now make the summary more concise
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m Continuing session ses_01HXYZ…F01 in \e[1mstandard\e[0m mode.
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m Dispatching a new sandbox attempt for turn 2.
\e[2m       task bakudo-ses_01HXYZ…F01-t2-a1\e[0m
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m Sandbox worker started.
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m Worker completed. Reviewing result.
\e[32mBakudo:\e[0m Accepted. 1 file changed and targeted tests passed.

\e[33m[inspect] [inspect provenance] [new]\e[0m
>
